scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run import:culture && pnpm --filter @workspace/culturally-connect-png run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
